title: Project Lag
description:
A modpack For A in development Lore Optional SMP 

Can also be used for singleplayer use.
body:
An inhouse Under Developement Modpakc for An Lore optional SMP.
This modpack is For an In development Lore optional SMP.

What this means is updates are semi-frequent and massive changes are expected. 

The current features are 
- Per world magic systems using, Scriptor magicae and Reactive alchemy
- many mods to make the world look more alive, such as Auroras, Creeper overhaul,excavated Variants.
- Deeper darker
- Performance enhancement using sodium, Iris, Ferritecore
- Better vanilla styles storage with mods like, Functional storage, Sophisticated backpacks/Storage, and toms simple storage!
- Retrofuturistic tech using Immersive engineering,
- TRAINS yes you heard me right. TRAINS from Railcraft!
- my very rapidly declining health and sanity
